known_issues: Admin role assignment is failing with an error

existing_features.title: Fix the frontend admin login flow in App.tsx so that after Internet Identity authentication completes, the adminLogin call is made correctly, errors are caught and displayed to the user, and on success the user is routed to the admin dashboard.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix the backend admin role assignment logic so that calling `adminLogin(username, password)` correctly grants the admin role to the caller's principal without throwing an error.
